MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2016 Continued To Oct-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Marc Pelta, Esq. specially appearing for former Plaintiffs Counsel Raymond Ghermezian and Melvin Marcia Esq. appearing for Defendant. Mr. Pelta advises the court that the POS of order granting motion to be relieved is filed, which is confirmed by clerk. Defendant counsel advises the court that a settlement of the case is pending with Plaintiff who is now in pro per. A Case Management Conference is set for Oct-19-2016, at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610 for status of settlement or trial setting. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK RWoods.; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Continued To Jul-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SAYEH KHOEI, ESQ. of Raymond Ghermezian, APLC, Tel No. 323-900-5800 appearing telephonically for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel. The Court rules as follows: RAYMOND GHERMEZIAN, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR MARIA LOURDES DUARTE is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (302/HK)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Katherine Moore, Esq. appearing for Defendant. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Apr-12-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610) *** NOTE: If Plaintiff's Counsel fails to appear at the next Order to Show Cause hearing, the Court intends to dismiss this case. ***
